title: UPNP for dedicated servers
description: Automatically forwards ports for your dedicated minecraft server with UPNP
body:
Automatically forwards ports for your dedicated minecraft server with UPNP. Opens ports when the server starts, and closes them when it stops. Useful if you want to quickly set up a server for your friends without the hassle of third party hosting or manually forwarding ports.
 

**Usage:**

The forwarded ports are configurable in the config file at `config/upnp.txt`.

Use the `/upnp` command to see in chat which ports are mapped and the IP players need to connect to the server with.

Both UDP and TCP ports can be opened. By default only the port `TCP 25565` will be opened (the default port for Minecraft servers).

If you are using mods such as Simple Voice Chat or Geyser, you must add the relevant ports to the config.
